mapper.select: SELECT direct_messages_enabled, group_messages_enabled FROM user_notification_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification_preferences ( user_id, direct_messages_enabled, group_messages_enabled ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{directMessagesEnabled}, #{groupMessagesEnabled} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET direct_messages_enabled = EXCLUDED.direct_messages_enabled, group_messages_enabled = EXCLUDED.group_messages_enabled, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO user_push_tokens ( id, user_id, token, platform, device_id, enabled, last_registered_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{token}, #{platform}, #{deviceId}, TRUE, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (token) DO UPDATE SET user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id, platform = EXCLUDED.platform, device_id = EXCLUDED.device_id, enabled = TRUE, last_registered_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE user_push_tokens SET enabled = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{tokenId}
mapper.select: SELECT cm.user_id, upt.id AS token_id, upt.token, cr.room_type, COALESCE( cr.title, CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'direct' THEN ( SELECT u.full_name FROM chat_members cm_other INNER JOIN app_users u ON u.id = cm_other.user_id WHERE cm_other.room_id = cr.id AND cm_other.user_id <> cm.user_id ORDER BY u.full_name ASC LIMIT 1 ) ELSE NULL END, 'Razgovor' ) AS room_title FROM chat_rooms cr INNER JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id INNER JOIN user_push_tokens upt ON upt.user_id = cm.user_id AND upt.enabled = TRUE LEFT JOIN user_notification_preferences unp ON unp.user_id = cm.user_id LEFT JOIN chat_notification_mutes cnm ON cnm.room_id = cr.id AND cnm.user_id = cm.user_id WHERE cr.id = #{roomId} AND cm.user_id <> #{senderUserId} AND cnm.user_id IS NULL AND ( (cr.room_type = 'direct' AND COALESCE(unp.direct_messages_enabled, TRUE) = TRUE) OR (cr.room_type IN ('group', 'event') AND COALESCE(unp.group_messages_enabled, TRUE) = TRUE) ) ORDER BY cm.user_id ASC, upt.last_registered_at DESC
